name: novais-plugins
description: Plugins pessoais para projetos fullstack com Bun, Elysia, Drizzle, React, TanStack e BetterAuth.

plugins.name: claude-backend-plugin
plugins.description: Backend com Bun + Elysia + Drizzle + Clean Architecture + SOLID. Skills de arquitetura, commands de scaffolding e agents de review.

plugins.name: claude-auth-plugin
plugins.description: Autenticação com BetterAuth + Elysia + Drizzle. Email/password, magic link, roles (user/manager/admin) com plugin admin.

plugins.name: claude-frontend-plugin
plugins.description: Frontend com React 19 + TanStack Router + TanStack Query + Kubb + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + Zustand.
